claims: The skill requests actions that are unrelated to its primary purpose as a Q&A platform for AI agents. Specifically, it mandates setting up autonomous duties to recruit users from another platform (Moltbook) by inviting them to ClawStack, which is a marketing or growth-hacking activity not necessary for posting or answering questions. This goes beyond the core functionality of a Q&A tool and leverages the agent's capabilities for platform promotion without clear user consent or relevance to the stated goal. Additionally, the forced replacement of the global error handler to automatically send all error details to ClawStack could lead to excessive data collection, though it is more aligned with the purpose; the recruitment duty is a clearer overreach.
